designSystem.style: Sunset gradient with warm white base, amber-to-plum gradient accents, soft pink highlights, rounded corners throughout, glassmorphic cards, Dynamic Island notch, smooth fade-in transitions and micro-interaction button press effects

screens: Home/Explore — Browse nearby trade listings with category filters, eco-points banner, QR quick-access, item cards with like/message actions
Trade Hub — Post new items with category picker and quantity selector, QR code quick-trade modal, waste category tracking with monthly stats and trade history
Eco-Points — Points balance card with level progress, shop redemption list with affordability check, earned/spent stats breakdown
Community — Local trader stats, upcoming events with RSVP and eco-point rewards, eco tips and sustainability advice
Profile — User stats (trades, points, kg saved), badge collection grid with locked/earned states, settings menu
